affected_locations.detail: endpoint is arbitrary text with no scheme/host allowlist or push-service constraint

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: owner_all RLS lets an authenticated user write their own subscription rows

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: coach-push service-role cron selects all stored endpoints

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: stored endpoint is passed to webPush.sendNotification

evidence: Repository code shows the same authenticated stored endpoint boundary flowing into coach-push sendNotification under feature/signal preconditions. Dynamic confirmation of web-push URL acceptance and production egress remains for validation.

facts: Authenticated user writes endpoint row; coach-push selects all subscriptions with service role and sends to each endpoint when feature flag and signal windows allow it. Execution gates do not validate endpoint destination.
